AI automation that clears your backlog fast.

AutoFlow turns repetitive tasks into smart workflows, helping teams respond faster, stay organized, and focus on high-impact work.

Built for teams that want less busywork

Everything is designed to be simple, fast, and useful on day one.

Smart workflows

Automate recurring tasks with AI-powered steps that adapt to your process.

Faster decisions

Surface the right actions and updates so your team can move without waiting.

Simple setup

Scales with you

From solo operators to growing teams, AutoFlow stays lightweight and reliable.
